name: Igor
notes: Provides clues needed to defeat Dracula.
standardDialog: Keep your lantern high. Shadows here remember faces.
If you seek Dracula's weakness, begin where old vows were broken.

dialogOptions.playerLine: How fares the town these nights?
dialogOptions.npcResponse: No one sleeps deeply. Even the dogs stare uphill.

dialogOptions.playerLine: I've heard tale of a dark castle in the outer reaches.
dialogOptions.npcResponse: Then you've heard true. If you would stand against Dracula, there is work to begin.

name: Castle Librarian
notes: Holds information about the Sacred Tome.
standardDialog: Books bite when handled by fools. Turn pages carefully.
Knowledge is a blade. Know where to point it.

dialogOptions.playerLine: How are the archives holding up?
dialogOptions.npcResponse: Dust and fear, mostly. Too many shelves are still sealed.

dialogOptions.playerLine: If the Sacred Tome still exists, I can retrieve it.
dialogOptions.npcResponse: Good. Then listen carefully before you set foot in those halls.

name: Captain Marla
notes: Leads moonlit supply routes and knows hidden road hazards.
standardDialog: Moonlight keeps the raiders nervous. We move when they squint.
Tie your packs high. Mud steals more than bandits do.

dialogOptions.playerLine: How bad are the roads right now?
dialogOptions.npcResponse: Worse after dusk. Wagons vanish where lanterns should be.

dialogOptions.playerLine: Give me the route and I'll escort your caravan.
dialogOptions.npcResponse: Brave words. Let's see if you can match them on the trail.

name: Warden Bren
notes: Coordinates militia patrols and tracks nearby den activity.
standardDialog: Bandits test fences first, then resolve.
If you clear the den, people will sleep with both eyes shut.

dialogOptions.playerLine: How is the town holding up?
dialogOptions.npcResponse: Holding, barely. Nights are loud and patrols are thin.

dialogOptions.playerLine: If you need a blade, point me where trouble is worst.
dialogOptions.npcResponse: Good. We've got two urgent problems, and either could use a brave hand.

name: Ferryman Colt
notes: Controls crossing schedules when floodwaters rise.
standardDialog: River decides the fare. I just collect it.
Storm upstream means trouble here by sundown.

dialogOptions.playerLine: How bad is the crossing this week?
dialogOptions.npcResponse: Bad enough that honest folk wait and desperate ones gamble.

dialogOptions.playerLine: If passage is blocked, I can help settle it.
dialogOptions.npcResponse: Then we can speak tolls, trouble, and who is making both worse.
